notes: SHIP v1.14.323 - pnav nav (owner lab-locked combo from PHANTOM_NAV_HANDOFF.md; owner picks in chat: '1' = rename tabs to Home/Build/Tools/Exit, 'hold' = keep EXIT as hold-to-freeze). Config: real glass WebP icons, per-icon color, always-on labels, flush, glass, underbar, large. APPROACH (per handoff 'match live conventions; don't paste blindly; integrate into existing location'): applied the pnav LOOK to the EXISTING #rd-botnav rather than pasting a new .pnav component - keeps all ids (#bn-command/#bn-work/#bn-ref/#rd-exit), showMode routing, and the .315 hold-to-exit wiring intact (lower blast radius, proven plumbing preserved). CHANGES: (1) 4 SVG glyphs -> precached WebP glass icons (icons/phantom-nav-home/build/tools/exit-256.webp, added to sw.js precache - NOT inlined base64 like the handoff: files match the app's icon convention + keep HTML lean + offline-safe). (2) labels renamed Command->Home, Work->Build, Cart->Tools (nav labels only; showMode keys stay command/work/ref; aria updated). (3) always-on labels (removed .321 hide-except-active) - short renamed words fit 390/4 with no wrap. (4) underbar: repurposed .btick as a per-color bar under the active tab (order:2 = under icon, above label), lit in that tab's --tc. (5) per-icon color via inline --tc: Home #61efff, Build #3d84ff, Tools #cfe3ee, Exit #ff4d4d. (6) icons 28->54px (large). Glass fill + flush + fixed + body.rd gate + .287 GPU layer all retained from .322. DEVIATIONS from handoff draft (reported): showPage()->showMode() (showPage is a LEGACY fn, banned under redesign); EXIT stays HOLD-to-freeze not a tap 'end-shift' (owner 'hold'; glove-safe, matches the .315 design) so #rd-exit never latches active and keeps rd_holdGesture/rd_freeze; icons as files not inline; kept desktop max-width:760 cap. NOTE 'device-verified on iPhone' in the handoff = the standalone nav-lab, NOT the integrated app (owner's phone was stuck in legacy) - so the LOOK is owner-locked but the integrated nav is still device-UNVERIFIED. Gates: brace balance, 4 inline
